verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ሊተ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ዘዕጣን ፡ እምዕ[ፅ] ፡ ዘኢይነቅዝ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the altar of incense of incorruptible wood.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make an altar to burn incense upon: of shittim wood shalt thou make it.

verses.geez:
ዘእመት ፡ [ኑኁ ፡] ወእመት ፡ ፅፍኁ ፡ ርቡዐ ፡ ግበሮ ፡ ወካዕበ ፡ እመት ፡ ቆሙ ፡ ወእምውስቴ[ቱ] ፡ ይትገበር ፡
                  አቅርንቲሁ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make it a cubit in length, and a cubit in breadth: it shall be square; and the height of it shall be of two cubits, its horns shall be of the same piece.
translations.kjv: A cubit shall be the length thereof, and a cubit the breadth thereof; foursquare shall it be: and two cubits shall be the height thereof: the horns thereof shall be of the same.

verses.geez:
ወትቀፍሎ ፡ ቅፍሎ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ወምድራ ፡ ወአረፍታ ፡ በዐውደ ፡ አቅርንቲሁ ፡ ወትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ ቀጸላ ፡
                  ዘየዐውድ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ በዐውዱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt gild its grate with pure gold, and its sides round about, and its horns; and thou shalt make for it a wreathen border of gold round-about.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt overlay it with pure gold, the top thereof, and the sides thereof round about, and the horns thereof; and thou shalt make unto it a crown of gold round about.

verses.geez:
ወክልኤ ፡ ሕለቃተ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ንጹ[ሕ] ፡ ትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ እንተ ፡ ምዕዋደ ፡ ቀጸላሃ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ፍናዊሁ ፡
                  ትገብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክልኤሆን ፡ ገበዋቲሁ ፡ ወታጠንፎ ፡ በጥንፍ ፡ ወታወዲያ ፡ መማሥጠ ፡ በዘ ፡ ትመሥጦን ፡ ቦቱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make under its wreathen border two rings of pure gold; thou shalt make it to the two corners on the two sides, and they shall be bearings for the staves, so as to bear it with them.
translations.kjv: And two golden rings shalt thou make to it under the crown of it, by the two corners thereof, upon the two sides of it shalt thou make it; and they shall be for places for the staves to bear it withal.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ መማሥጢሆን ፡ እምዕ[ፅ ፡ ዘ]ኢይነቅዝ ፡ ወትቀፍሎን ፡ ቅፍሎ ፡ ዘወርቅ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the staves of incorruptible wood, and shalt gild them with gold.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make the staves of shittim wood, and overlay them with gold.

verses.geez: ወታነብሮ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ መንጦላዕት ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ታቦት ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ [በ]ዘ ፡ እትኤመር ፡ በህየ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt set it before the veil that is over the ark of the testimonies, wherein I will make myself known to thee from thence.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put it before the vail that is by the ark of the testimony, before the mercy seat that is over the testimony, where I will meet with thee.

verses.geez: ወይዕጥን ፡ በውስቴቱ ፡ አሮን ፡ ዕጣነ ፡ ዘቅታሬ ፡ ደቂቅ ፡ በበነግህ ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron shall burn upon it fine compound incense every morning; whensoever he trims the lamps he shall burn incense upon it.
translations.kjv: And Aaron shall burn thereon sweet incense every morning: when he dresseth the lamps, he shall burn incense upon it.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ይገብር ፡ መኃትወ ፡ [በበሰርክ ፡] ይዕጥን ፡ በውስቴቱ ፡ ዕጥነተ ፡ ዘለዘልፍ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  በዳሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And when Aaron lights the lamps in the evening, he shall burn incense upon it; a constant incense-offering always before the Lord for their generations.
translations.kjv: And when Aaron lighteth the lamps at even, he shall burn incense upon it, a perpetual incense before the LORD throughout your generations.

verses.geez: ወኢትደምሩ ፡ ውስቴቱ ፡ ዕጣነ ፡ ዘካልእ ፡ ቅታሬሁ ፤ ፍሬ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕት ፡ ወሞጻሕተ ፡ ኢታውጽኁ ፡ ዲቤሁ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt not offer strange incense upon it, nor an offering made by fire, nor a sacrifice; and thou shalt not pour a drink-offering upon it.
translations.kjv: Ye shall offer no strange incense thereon, nor burnt sacrifice, nor meat offering; neither shall ye pour drink offering thereon.

verses.geez:
ይትመሃለል ፡ አሮን ፡ በዲበ ፡ አቅርንቲሁ ፡ ለለዓመት ፡ ምዕረ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ደም ፡ ዘያነጽሕ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ምዕረ ፡
                  ለዓመት ፡ ይገብር ፡ ከመ ፡ ያንጽሕ ፡ በዳሮሙ ፡ ወቅዱሰ ፡ ቅዱሳን ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And once in the year Aaron shall make atonement on its horns, he shall purge it with the blood of purification for their generations: it is most holy to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And Aaron shall make an atonement upon the horns of it once in a year with the blood of the sin offering of atonements: once in the year shall he make atonement upon it throughout your generations: it is most holy unto the LORD.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ለእመ ፡ ነሣእከ ፡ ሕሊናሆሙ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ አመ ፡ ትኄውጾሙ ፡ ለየሀብ ፡ ፩፩ቤዛ ፡ ነፍሱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ወኢይምጻእ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ድቀት ፡ አመ ፡ ይኄውጾሙ ።

translations.lxx: If thou take account of the children of Israel in the surveying of them, and they shall give every one a ransom for his soul to the Lord, then there shall not be among them a destruction in the visiting of them.
translations.kjv: When thou takest the sum of the children of Israel after their number, then shall they give every man a ransom for his soul unto the LORD, when thou numberest them; that there be no plague among them, when thou numberest them.

verses.geez:
ዝውእቱ ፡ ዘይሁቡ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ እለ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትኅወጹ ፡ መንፈቁ ፡ ለዲድረክም ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ በከመ ፡ ዲድረክም
                  ፡ ቅዱስ ፤ ፳[ኦቦሊ ፡] ዲድረክም ፡ ቅዱስ ፤ ወመንፈቁ ፡ ለዲድረክም ፡ ቍርባን ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And this is what they shall give, as many as pass the survey, half a didrachm which is according to the didrachm of the sanctuary: twenty oboli go to the didrachm, but the half of the didrachm is the offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: This they shall give, every one that passeth among them that are numbered, half a shekel after the shekel of the sanctuary: (a shekel is twenty gerahs:) an half shekel shall be the offering of the LORD.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ ዘየሐውር ፡ ከመ ፡ [ይትኀወጽ ፡] ዘእም፳ክራማቲሁ ፡ ወፈድፋደ ፡ ያበውኡ ፡ ቍርባኒሆሙ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Every one that passes the survey from twenty years old and upwards shall give the offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Every one that passeth among them that are numbered, from twenty years old and above, shall give an offering unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ባዕል ፡ ኢይወስክ ፡ ወነዳይ ፡ ኢ[ያ]ንትግ ፡ እምንፍቃሃ ፡ ለዲድረክም ፡ እለ ፡ ያበውኡ ፡ ቍርባኒሆሙ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ ቤዛ ፡ ነፍሶሙ ።

translations.lxx: The rich shall not give more, and the poor shall not give less than the half didrachm in giving the offering to the Lord, to make atonement for your souls.
translations.kjv: The rich shall not give more, and the poor shall not give less than half a shekel, when they give an offering unto the LORD, to make an atonement for your souls.

verses.geez:
ወትነሥእ ፡ ብሩረ ፡ ዘአብኡ ፡ ቍርባኒሆሙ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወትሁቦ ፡ ለምግባረ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ ወይኩኖሙ
                  ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ተዝካረ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቤዛ ፡ ነፍሶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take the money of the offering from the children of Israel, and shalt give it for the service of the tabernacle of testimony; and it shall be to the children of Israel a memorial before the Lord, to make atonement for your souls.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take the atonement money of the children of Israel, and shalt appoint it for the service of the tabernacle of the congregation; that it may be a memorial unto the children of Israel before the LORD, to make an atonement for your souls.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ግበር ፡ መቅለደ ፡ ዘብርት ፡ ወመንበሩኒ ፡ ዘብርት ፡ በዘ ፡ ይትኀፀቡ ፡ ወታነብሮ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡
                  ወማእከለ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ወትሰውጥ ፡ ውስቴቱ ፡ ማየ ።

translations.lxx: Make a brazen laver, and a brazen base for it, for washing; and thou shalt put it between the tabernacle of witness and the altar, and thou shalt pour forth water into it.
translations.kjv: Thou shalt also make a laver of brass, and his foot also of brass, to wash withal: and thou shalt put it between the tabernacle of the congregation and the altar, and thou shalt put water therein.

verses.geez: ወይትኀፀብ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወደቂቁ ፡ እምውስቴቱ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ወእገሪሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron and his sons shall wash their hands and their feet with water from it.
translations.kjv: For Aaron and his sons shall wash their hands and their feet thereat:

verses.geez:
ሶበ ፡ ይበውኡ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ ይትኀፀቡ ፡ በማይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይሙቱ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ይበውኡ ፡ ቤተ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ይሡዑ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ያዐርጉ ፡ ምሥዋዐ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፤

translations.lxx: Whensoever they shall go into the tabernacle of witness, they shall wash themselves with water, so they shall not die, whensoever they advance to the altar to do service and to offer the whole burnt-offerings to the Lord.
translations.kjv: When they go into the tabernacle of the congregation, they shall wash with water, that they die not; or when they come near to the altar to minister, to burn offering made by fire unto the LORD:

verses.geez:
ይትኀፀቡ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ወእገሪሆሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይሙቱ ፡ ወይኩኖሙ ፡ ሕገ ፡ ዘለዓለም ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ወለዘመዶሙ ፡ እምድኅሬሁ
                  ።

translations.lxx: They shall wash their hands and feet with water, whensoever they shall go into the tabernacle of witness; they shall wash themselves with water, that they die not; and it shall be for them a perpetual statute, for him and his posterity after him.
translations.kjv: So they shall wash their hands and their feet, that they die not: and it shall be a statute for ever to them, even to him and to his seed throughout their generations.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: Moreover the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ወአንተኒ ፡ ንሣእ ፡ አፈዋተ ፡ ጽጌ ፡ ዘከርቤ ፡ ቅድወ ፡ ኀምስተ ፡ ምእተ ፡ ሰቅሎን ፡ ወቅናሞሙ ፡ ቅድወ ፡ በመንፈቀ
                  ፡ ቀዳሚ ፡ ፪፻ወ፶ወቀጺመተ ፡ ቅድወ ፡ ፪፻ወ፶ ፤

translations.lxx: Do thou also take sweet herbs, the flower of choice myrrh five hundred shekels, and the half of this two hundred and fifty shekels of sweet-smelling cinnamon, and two hundred and fifty shekels of sweet-smelling calamus,
translations.kjv: Take thou also unto thee principal spices, of pure myrrh five hundred shekels, and of sweet cinnamon half so much, even two hundred and fifty shekels, and of sweet calamus two hundred and fifty shekels,

verses.geez: ወአበሚ ፡ ፭፻በሰቅሎስ ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ ወቅብኡ ፡ እምዘይት ።

translations.lxx: and of cassia five hundred shekels of the sanctuary, and a hin of olive oil.
translations.kjv: And of cassia five hundred shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary, and of oil olive an hin:

verses.geez: ወግበሮ ፡ ቅብአ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ጽዒጠ ፡ ዘጸዓጢ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make it a holy anointing oil, a perfumed ointment tempered by the art of the perfumer: it shall be a holy anointing oil.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make it an oil of holy ointment, an ointment compound after the art of the apothecary: it shall be an holy anointing oil.

verses.geez: ወትቀብኦ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ መርጡር ፡ ወለታቦተ ፡ መርጡር ፤

translations.lxx: And thou shalt anoint with it the tabernacle of witness, and the ark of the tabernacle of witness,
translations.kjv: And thou shalt anoint the tabernacle of the congregation therewith, and the ark of the testimony,

verses.geez: ወለኵሉ ፡ ንዋዩ ፡ ወተቅዋመ ፡ ማኅቶቱ ፡ ወ[ለ]ኵሉ ፡ ንዋዩ ፡ ወቤተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፤

translations.lxx: and all its furniture, and the candlestick and all its furniture, and the altar of incense,
translations.kjv: And the table and all his vessels, and the candlestick and his vessels, and the altar of incense,

verses.geez: ወኀበ ፡ ይሠውዑ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ንዋዮ ፡ ወማእዶ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ንዋዮ ፡ ወመቅለደ ፡ ምስለ ፡ መንበሩ ።

translations.lxx: and the altar of whole burnt-offerings and all its furniture, and the table and all its furniture, and the laver.
translations.kjv: And the altar of burnt offering with all his vessels, and the laver and his foot.

verses.geez: ወትቄድሶሙ ፡ ወይኩኑ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ቅዱሳን ፡ ወዘኪያሆን ፡ ለከፈ ፡ ለይትቀደስ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt sanctify them, and they shall be most holy: every one that touches them shall be hallowed.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt sanctify them, that they may be most holy: whatsoever toucheth them shall be holy.

verses.geez: ወለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ቅብኦሙ ፡ ወቀድሶሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሡዑ ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt anoint Aaron and his sons, and sanctify them that they may minister to me as priests.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt anoint Aaron and his sons, and consecrate them, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office.

verses.geez: ወበሎሙ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ዘይትቀብኡ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ለይኩን ፡ ማእከሌክሙ ፡ ዝቅብእ ፡ በትውልድክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt speak to the children of Israel, saying, This shall be to you a holy anointing oil throughout your generations.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel, saying, This shall be an holy anointing oil unto me throughout your generations.

verses.geez:
ወባዕድ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ኢይትቀብኦ ፡ ወዝጽዒጥ ፡ ባዕድ ፡ ጸዓጢ ፡ ኢይግበሮ ፡ ወለክሙሂ ፡ ኢተግበሩ ፡ ዘከማሁ ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ቅዱስ ፡ ዝቅብእ ፡ ወቅዱሰ ፡ ለይኩን ፡ በኀቤክሙ ።

translations.lxx: On man's flesh it shall not be poured, and ye shall not make any for yourselves according to this composition: it is holy, and shall be holiness to you.
translations.kjv: Upon man’s flesh shall it not be poured, neither shall ye make any other like it, after the composition of it: it is holy, and it shall be holy unto you.

verses.geez: እመ ፡ ትገብርዎ ፡ ወዘወሀበ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ለባዕድ ፡ ዘመድ ፡ ለይሠሮ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝቡ ።

translations.lxx: Whosoever shall make it in like manner, and whosoever shall give of it to a stranger, shall be destroyed from among his people.
translations.kjv: Whosoever compoundeth any like it, or whosoever putteth any of it upon a stranger, shall even be cut off from his people.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ንሣእ ፡ ለከ ፡ አፈዋተ ፡ ማየ ፡ ልብን ፡ ወ[ቀ]ንአተ ፡ ቅድወ ፡ ወስኂነ ፡
                  ዘያንጸበርቅ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዕሩየ ፡ ለይኩን ፡ ድልወቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Take for thyself sweet herbs, stacte, onycha, sweet galbanum, and transparent frankincense; there shall be an equal weight of each.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Take unto thee sweet spices, stacte, and onycha, and galbanum; these sweet spices with pure frankincense: of each shall there be a like weight:

verses.geez: ወይግበርዎ ፡ ዕጣነ ፡ ኬንያሁ ፡ ግብረተ ፡ ዕጣን ፡ ቅድው ፡ ግብረተ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ግበር ።

translations.lxx: And they shall make with it perfumed incense, tempered with the art of a perfumer, a pure holy work.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make it a perfume, a confection after the art of the apothecary, tempered together, pure and holy:

verses.geez:
ወተሐርጽ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ድቂቀ ፡ ወታነብር ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ እትኤመር ፡ ለከ ፡ እምህየ ፡
                  ወቅዱሰ ፡ ቅዱሳን ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ ዝዕጣን ።

translations.lxx: And of these thou shalt beat some small, and thou shalt put it before the testimonies in the tabernacle of testimony, whence I will make myself known to thee: it shall be to you a most holy incense.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt beat some of it very small, and put of it before the testimony in the tabernacle of the congregation, where I will meet with thee: it shall be unto you most holy.

verses.geez: [ወበዝ ፡ ግብረት ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ አርአያ ፡ ዝዕጣን ፡] ሕሩመ ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ ወቅዱሰ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall not make any for yourselves according to this composition; it shall be to you a holy thing for the Lord.
translations.kjv: And as for the perfume which thou shalt make, ye shall not make to yourselves according to the composition thereof: it shall be unto thee holy for the LORD.

verses.geez: ወዘአግበረ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያጼንዎ ፡ ለይማስን ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝቡ ።

translations.lxx: Whosoever shall make any in like manner, so as to smell it, shall perish from his people.
translations.kjv: Whosoever shall make like unto that, to smell thereto, shall even be cut off from his people.
